block_02: Ignore the noise, follow the trend
block_03: A price chart is, essentially, a sequence of ups and downs, influenced by trader’s activity. But not every up or down is valuable to analysis. Filtering out the insignificant short-term movements can be beneficial to reveal the actual underlying trend.
block_04: ZigZag is an indicator that does just that — it only shows signals when the price swings are significant enough to act on them. Read the article and watch the video to learn more.
block_08: I want to be good at technical analysis, but I don’t really know where to start. Help!
block_11: This question is not uncommon among novice traders. If you want to start with the basics and really learn about technical trading, we recommend checking out John Murphy’s “Technical Analysis of the Financial Markets”. It is a book that explains the 10 fundamental laws of technical analysis. If you want to briefly get acquainted with them, check out the article below.
block_15: 5 Common Mistakes in Day Trading
block_16: Mistakes are scary, but don’t worry! We have collected 5 of the most popular ones and provided solutions for them.
